chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.254 of 2024 (Mst. Faiza Zafar v. The State and others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 10.05.2024 Mr. Aqil Ahmed, advocate for the applicant Mr. Irshad Ali, Assistant Attorney General Inspector Shaikh Suhail Mehmood FIA Karachi ========= It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the property owned by the applicant has been attached by the learned trial Court in terms of Section 88 Cr.PC on account of absconcion of accused Syed Muhammad Younus Bukhari who is/was having no concern with the applicant or her property. The applicant on coming to know of attachment of her property sought its detachment by making such application; it has been dismissed by the learned trial Court based on office note in a slipshod manner and by way of nonspeaking order. By contending so, he sought to set aside the impugned order, which is not opposed by the learned Assistant Attorney General for the respondents. Consequently, the impugned order is set aside with the direction to the learned trial Court to pass the same afresh by ascertaining the fact that the property under attachment belongs to the applicant, if yes, and then under what circumstances it has been attached on account of absconsion of the above named absconding accused. Instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
